items.name: Jawaz-Keyzor/CS2-External-Cheat-2026
items.full_text: External gameplay assistant for CS2. Provides visual overlay through screen capture analysis — wall transparency visualization, sound radar, grenade trajectory helper. No memory access, no injection. Educational project for studying computer vision and overlay rendering.
